summary: validate-output-coherence sub-skill existed since v2.6.17 but no caller was wired. snapshot-brand Step 7 and setup-brand Step 4 now invoke it as a mandatory pre-ship gate on their operator-facing summaries. Catches the fabrication class where the agent narrates claims that contradict or invent entity fields.

changes.reason: Step 7 adds the coherence invocation as the 3rd silent post-save action. Hard Rules add the no-narrative-without-coherence-check rule citing the compliance_gap fabrication trigger.
Step 4 context recap: coherence check required before sending recap to operator.

operator_impact: post-save and post-recap summaries are now fact-consistent with the JSON on disk. No change to the files the operator owns.
tested_on: SKILL.md edits, verified against Nooance onboarding fabrication trace (compliance_gap {} vs narrative 'flagged CRITICAL')
caught_by: same fresh-instance onboarding test as v2.6.20/21 (finding #3).
known_gaps: Gate is a SKILL.md instruction, not hook-enforced. If the calling agent skips the Task tool invocation, the check doesn't run.
No PreToolUse hook yet intercepting operator-facing completions mentioning entity fields. Candidate v2.7.x.
